ogTitle: Coorow vs Cooya Pooya: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coorow and Cooya Pooya.
heading: Coorow vs Cooya Pooya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coorow, Western Australia and Cooya Pooya, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coorow has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Cooya Pooya (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coorow or Cooya Pooya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coorow has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Cooya Pooya scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coorow scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Cooya Pooya scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coorow or Cooya Pooya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coorow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
